Convicted child killer and parole violator arrested at a Florida spring break beachA dangerous Ohio man, Anthony Grove, with a history of involuntary manslaughter, was apprehended in Daytona Beach amidst spring break crowds. Wanted for parole violations, deputies discovered him during a beach sweep. Grove, previously released in 2023, now faces additional Florida charges including drug possession and failure to register as a felon, and is awaiting extradition.
